ducksemantics 0.0.0.9000

Construct a ColBERT late-interaction query

Source: R/interfaces.R
ducksemantics_colbert_query.Rd

Encodes text with the profile's query contract and returns a query object directly consumable by ducksemantics_late_interaction_search(). Candidate blocks must have been stored from a ColBERT document provider with the same label.

Usage

ducksemantics_colbert_query(
  model,
  text,
  provider = "Rbebelm ColBERT",
  subject_kind = NULL,
  top_k = 10L,
  table = NULL,
  candidate_subject_id = NULL
)

Arguments

model

A Rbebelm ColbertModel object.

text

Non-empty query text.

provider

Stored document provider label.

subject_kind

Optional candidate subject-kind filter.

top_k

Number of candidate blocks to return.

table

Optional token-embedding table.

candidate_subject_id

Optional candidate subject identifiers.

Value

A DucksemanticsTokenEmbeddingQuery.
